[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market experienced a roller coaster ride during the week, with sharp up-
and-down movements primarily driven by significant fluctuations in the exchange rate. Demand from end buyers remains fair; however, challenges persist in the resale steel
market. Credit terms have extended from one day to 10 days, reflecting continued
weakness in the broader steel economy.
